title: Annual UAF Arctic Research Open House set for May 19
summary: The International Arctic Research Center is participating in the 2022 Arctic Research Open House from 4-7 p.m. Thursday, May 19. title: Monthly Manager’s Report
summary: May 10, 2022 SUMMARY What a nice feeling it is to have just wrapped up a very successful Annual Meeting. Events have looked very different for the past two years and I am grateful that we were able to be back in person. However, as with any large project there tends to be a sigh of relief when it is over. This year’s event was well attended and thanks to the terrific planning and participation from many of the employees, the event flowed extremely well. Congratulations to Wayne, Dan, and Erin who all won in their respective districts. Thank you to all the members who ran for a seat on the HEA Board of Directors (BOD). Your willingness to participate in the process is valued and is what makes Cooperatives positively unique. Furthermore, I wanted to take a moment to express my sincerest gratitude to Director Chay and Director Oberts who are...

title: USDA forecasts winter wheat production down in 2022
summary: U.S. farmers are expected to produce 1.17 billion bushels of winter wheat this year, according to the Crop Production report released today by USDA’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS). title: Burn It: Why You Shouldn’t Travel with Firewood
summary: Burn firewood near where you harvest or buy it because pests can travel with the firewood bundle and be introduced to a new area. The post Burn It: Why You Shouldn’t Travel with Firewood appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
